message:
test(fcp-sdk): expand tests for formatting, schema validation, retry, and streaming

Add ~40 new tests covering:
- formatting.rs: HTML/Markdown validation edge cases, strip functions,
  error classification, entity decoding, plaintext fallback
- lib.rs: SchemaValidator number ranges/patterns/additional properties,
  input/output validation, Limits enforcement edge cases (nested arrays,
  depth limits), format_path, Debug trait implementations
- retry.rs: RetryPolicy edge cases (zero/one max attempts, backoff
  calculations, capping), HTTP status decision mapping, external error
  mapping, duration conversion
- streaming.rs: ReplayError Display/Clone, BufferLimits,
  AckResult/NackResult Debug/Clone, SubscribeOutcome,
  SequentialEnqueueError Display/Eq, processor config defaults

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
